text.title: Remote Workshop Toolkit — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the artefacts a remote workshop must produce. The agent producing or reviewing a run-book MUST verify these before publishing the invite.

forbidden.pattern: agenda block longer than 50 min without break (Zoom fatigue floor)
breakout entry missing any of the four roles (facilitator, timekeeper, scribe, deliverable)
pre_read.acknowledgement_rate < 0.7 AND workshop status == "go" — escalate, do not proceed
canvas linked as "view-only" for any attendee
recording is the sole output (decision_log empty)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Reduce a 90-min live block into two 50-min blocks with a 15-min stretch break.
Promote a breakout to a separate session if its scope exceeds 30 min.
Substitute "async pulse" with a Loom video + structured comment if the cohort is fully async-first.

list.item: Camera/mic policy stated on invite + visible on canvas frame 1
Time-zone coverage ≥80% OR split into 2 sessions
Async pulse scheduled between sessions if there is >1 session
Decision log filled by end of session, not in follow-up email
